name: Withings MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Withings health devices — smart scales, blood pressure monitors, sleep trackers, and fitness watches. Enables AI agents to retrieve Withings health measurements: body weight, BMI, blood pressure, heart rate, sleep data, and step counts for health tracking and wellness AI applications.
use_cases: Retrieving body weight and composition data from Withings scale for health tracking agents
Querying sleep quality and duration data from Withings Sleep Analyzer for wellness agents
Accessing blood pressure and heart rate readings from Withings devices for health monitoring
Building AI-powered health dashboards integrating Withings biometric data
not_for: Fitbit, Apple Watch, or other wearable platforms (device-specific)
Clinical medical monitoring requiring certified medical devices
best_when: A health-conscious user or developer with Withings health devices wants AI agents to analyze health metrics, track trends, and build personalized wellness workflows using biometric data.
avoid_when: You don't have Withings devices. Health data is sensitive — ensure privacy practices meet your requirements.

auth.notes: Withings OAuth 2.0. Requires Withings developer account and app registration. Scopes for measurement types (weight, sleep, activity, etc.).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Withings API is free for personal use
pricing.paid_tiers: None for API; Withings devices and Health Mate subscription costs apply
pricing.notes: Withings API is free for personal use. Developer registration required. Device hardware costs apply.

performance.rate_limits: Withings API rate limits apply — generally adequate for personal use

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Health biometric data is highly sensitive — store and process per GDPR/HIPAA requirements
OAuth token expires — implement refresh token management for long-running agents
Measurement data is only as current as last device sync — not real-time
Community MCP implementation — not official Withings SDK
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Biometric health data is highly sensitive. GDPR compliance required for EU data. OAuth 2.0 with health data scopes. Data stored on Withings EU servers.

security_score_components.security_notes: Health data is highly sensitive. GDPR. OAuth 2.0 with granular health scopes. EU data residency.
